feature.name: FileMaker Frontend Removal
feature.description: Remove all FileMaker dependencies from the frontend, transitioning to pure Supabase + Backend API architecture

standing_constraints: Do not remove FileMaker code until all feature backend integrations are verified working
Maintain backward compatibility during transition - use feature flags if needed
All changes must pass build and existing tests
Follow backend change request protocol - do not modify database schema
Update documentation as code is removed
Keep audit trail of what was removed and why

tasks.title: Verify all feature backend integrations complete
tasks.description: Check that all prerequisite feature migrations (customers, tasks, projects, notes, links, financial records, QuickBooks) have backend APIs deployed and functional. Teams is already complete (INS0026). Review deployment status and test basic API calls for each feature.
tasks.verification_notes: All 8 core features verified with backend APIs deployed. 88+ endpoints operational. See BACKEND_INTEGRATION_VERIFICATION.md for complete report.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented a full verification of backend integrations across prerequisite features by reviewing the OpenAPI spec, checking key API integration points for customers, projects, tasks, notes, links, financial records, QuickBooks, and teams, and confirming auth and endpoint availability. Added documentation outputs in 'BACKEND_INTEGRATION_VERIFICATION.md', '.devflow/tasks/filemaker-frontend-removal/TSK0001_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md', and '.devflow/tasks/filemaker-frontend-removal/README.md', and updated '.devflow/tasks/filemaker-frontend-removal/tasks.json' to mark 'TSK0001' complete. Confirmed the project compiles cleanly via 'npm run build' and noted the key decision that several features are already backend-only while customers, projects, and tasks still retain FileMaker fallbacks for compatibility.

tasks.title: Audit FileMaker references in codebase
tasks.description: Create comprehensive inventory of all FileMaker references, categorized by: (1) API calls, (2) environment detection, (3) authentication, (4) configuration, (5) utilities, (6) tests. Document which references are safe to remove vs. which need replacement. Output to audit report file.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented a comprehensive audit of all FileMaker references across the codebase and produced two new deliverables: 'FILEMAKER_AUDIT_REPORT.md' (inventory of 85 files, categorized into 6 reference types with per-file removal safety analysis, dependency graph, backend verification checklist, and a 6-phase removal plan) and 'AUDIT_SUMMARY.md' (executive stats, readiness assessment, risks, and next steps). Key decisions included categorizing references by integration pattern (API calls, environment detection, auth/config, utilities, UI, tests) and defining a phased deprecation approach that keeps core environment detection until the final phase while removing low-risk examples first. Verified report completeness and confirmed the build still succeeds after generating the documentation.

tasks.title: Create feature flag system for gradual rollout
tasks.description: Implement a feature flag mechanism to control FileMaker vs. Backend API routing during transition. Add useFeatureFlag hook and FeatureFlagProvider context. Flags should control: (1) use_filemaker_auth, (2) use_filemaker_customers, (3) use_filemaker_projects, etc. Allows safe incremental migration.
tasks.verification_notes: Feature flag system fully implemented with FeatureFlagContext, useFeatureFlag hook, environment-aware helpers, and declarative routing. Includes localStorage persistence, 15 default flags for all major features, and comprehensive documentation. Build verified successful.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented a feature flag system to support gradual rollout of backend API migrations, including a new FeatureFlagContext provider with localStorage persistence and CRUD operations plus hooks for basic access, environment-aware flag behavior, and declarative routing. Key files added or updated include 'src/context/FeatureFlagContext.jsx', 'src/hooks/useFeatureFlag.js', 'src/hooks/index.js', and integration of the FeatureFlagProvider into the app provider hierarchy in 'src/main.jsx' (placed after AppStateProvider). Added comprehensive documentation in 'docs/FEATURE_FLAGS.md' and 'docs/FEATURE_FLAG_MIGRATION_EXAMPLE.md', and updated 'CLAUDE.md' with usage patterns, available flags, and debugging notes; builds were run and confirmed successful to validate compilation.

tasks.title: Update customers API to use backend endpoints
tasks.description: Replace FileMaker calls in src/api/customers.js with backend API endpoints. Update fetchCustomers, fetchCustomerById, createCustomer, updateCustomer, deleteCustomer functions. Handle new schema mapping, error handling, and pagination. Add feature flag support.
tasks.verification_notes: Updated all customer API endpoints from /contacts_api to /api/customers. Updated dataService.js layout mapping. All endpoints now use correct backend API paths including /api/customers/search and /api/customers/{id}/status. Build verified successful.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented the switch from legacy '/contacts_api' routes to the real backend customer endpoints by updating 'src/api/customers.js' to call '/api/customers' for all CRUD operations (and aligning status toggling to use '/api/customers/{id}/status' with an 'is_active' boolean plus updating active-customer filtering to use 'active=true'), while confirming '/api/customers/search' was already correct. Updated 'src/services/dataService.js' to remap 'devCustomers' from 'contacts_api' to 'api/customers' so frontend requests resolve through the Vite '/api' proxy correctly. Kept the existing environment-aware routing to preserve FileMaker compatibility and noted the existing 'use_backend_customers' feature flag for future rollout rather than changing behavior now. Also recorded completion by updating 'tasks.json' and adding 'TSK0004_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md'.

tasks.title: Update projects API to use backend endpoints
tasks.description: Replace FileMaker calls in src/api/projects.js with backend API endpoints. Update fetchProjects, fetchProjectById, createProject, updateProject, archiveProject functions. Handle new schema for objectives, images, and related data. Add feature flag support.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented backend-ready projects API routing by updating the client in 'projects.js' to consistently use REST-style backend endpoints with the '/api' prefix (covering core project CRUD plus related objectives, steps, images, notes, status, and reorder operations) while retaining FileMaker fallback and existing org scoping and normalization. Fixed response handling in 'fetchProjectsForCustomers' to correctly unwrap array payloads when aggregating results across multiple customers. Deliberately kept feature flag logic out of the API layer after confirming hooks are not usable there, aligning with the established pattern in 'customers.js' where the 'use_backend_projects' rollout flag (default false) is enforced at the service or hook level. Added a completion note in '.devflow/tasks/projects-backend-integration/TSK0002_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md' and verified changes via a successful build.

tasks.title: Update tasks API to use backend endpoints
tasks.description: Replace FileMaker calls in src/api/tasks.js with backend API endpoints. Update fetchTasks, fetchTaskById, createTask, updateTask, updateTaskStatus functions. Handle timer operations (start/stop/pause) using new backend timer endpoints. Add feature flag support.
tasks.verification_notes: Updated all task and timer API endpoints to use environment-aware routing. Replaced hardcoded USE_BACKEND_API flag with getEnvironmentContext(). Task CRUD operations now use /api/tasks endpoints, timer operations use /time-entries endpoints. All functions maintain FileMaker fallback for backward compatibility. Build verified successful.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented TSK0006 by migrating the frontend tasks API to environment-aware backend endpoints using dataService instead of a hardcoded USE_BACKEND_API flag, while preserving the FileMaker fallback via getEnvironmentContext and ENVIRONMENT_TYPES. Updated src/api/tasks.js to route task CRUD through '/api/tasks' (including toggle-completion) and reworked timer operations to use the '/time-entries/*' pattern rather than '/tasks/{id}/timer/*', keeping data transformations and handleApiError consistency. Marked the work complete in '.devflow/tasks/filemaker-frontend-removal/tasks.json' and added documentation in '.devflow/tasks/filemaker-frontend-removal/TSK0006_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md' and '.devflow/tasks/filemaker-frontend-removal/TSK0006_QUICK_REFERENCE.md', with builds verified via 'npm run build'.

tasks.title: Update notes API to use backend endpoints
tasks.description: Replace FileMaker calls in src/api/notes.js with backend API endpoints. Update fetchNotesByEntity, createNote, updateNote, deleteNote functions. Handle polymorphic associations (customer/project/task). Add feature flag support.
tasks.verification_notes: Notes API already fully migrated to backend endpoints. All functions use dataService with proper REST endpoints (/projects/{id}/notes, /tasks/{id}/notes, /customers/{id}/notes). No FileMaker-specific code found. Feature flags enabled (use_backend_project_notes, use_backend_task_notes). Build verified successful.
tasks.implementation_notes: Verified that TSK0007 was already complete: the notes API in 'src/api/notes.js' uses backend endpoints via 'dataService.get post patch delete' for project, task, and customer notes, with org scoping and no FileMaker-specific logic in the notes layer (environment routing remains centralized in 'dataService'). Confirmed supporting layers in 'src/services/noteService.js' (snake_case to camelCase, 'note' to 'content', backward-compatible 'fieldData') and 'src/hooks/useNote.js' (CRUD and per-entity pagination) are backend-ready, and validated feature flags 'use_backend_project_notes' and 'use_backend_task_notes' are enabled. Marked TSK0007 done in 'tasks.json' and added verification and reference docs ('TSK0007_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md', 'TSK0007_QUICK_REFERENCE.md', 'TSK0007_VERIFICATION_REPORT.md') after confirming the build passes.

tasks.title: Update links API to use backend endpoints
tasks.description: Replace FileMaker calls in src/api/links.js with backend API endpoints. Update fetchLinksByEntity, createLink, updateLink, deleteLink functions. Handle polymorphic associations (customer/project/task). Add feature flag support.
tasks.verification_notes: Links API already fully migrated to backend endpoints. Removed all FileMaker-specific code from linkService.js (processLinks function, environment checks) and useLink.js (environment detection, conditional response handling). Enabled use_backend_links feature flag. Build verified successful.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented full cleanup of remaining FileMaker legacy logic in the Links feature now that the API layer already targets backend '/links' endpoints. Updated 'src/services/linkService.js' to remove the FileMaker-only 'processLinks' formatter plus environment-context imports and conditional routing, and updated 'src/hooks/useLink.js' to drop environment checks and simplify create handling to backend responses only. Enabled the 'use_backend_links' flag by default in 'src/context/FeatureFlagContext.jsx', then verified the build, removed remaining FileMaker references, and added completion and verification docs while marking the task complete in 'tasks.json'.

tasks.title: Update financial records API to use backend endpoints
tasks.description: Replace FileMaker calls in src/api/financialRecords.js with backend API endpoints. Update fetchFinancialRecords, fetchUnpaidRecords, fetchRecordsByDateRange functions. Handle new customer_sales schema. Add feature flag support.
tasks.verification_notes: Migrated all financial records operations from Supabase RPC to Backend API endpoints via dataService. Updated data transformations for backend schema (string to float parsing). Added project_id support. Deprecated get-by-ID functions. Feature flag already enabled (use_backend_financial_records: true). Build verified successful.
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented TSK0009 by migrating the financial records API from Supabase RPC calls to Backend API REST endpoints using environment-aware dataService. Replaced getSupabaseClient with dataService.get/post/patch throughout src/api/financialRecords.js for all query, summary, create, and update operations. Updated normalizeFinancialRecords() to parse backend string values (quantity, unit_price, total_price) to floats and handle new fields (project_id, billing_status, time_entry_id, configuration_data). Deprecated fetchFinancialRecordByRecordId and fetchFinancialRecordByUUID with console warnings (backend has no get-by-ID endpoint). Feature flag 'use_backend_financial_records' already enabled. Build verified successful (npm run build). Added completion documentation (TSK0009_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md, TSK0009_QUICK_REFERENCE.md). Key changes: all endpoints now use /api/financial-records/* paths with HMAC auth and org scoping via dataService, added project filtering support, backward-compatible fieldData wrapper maintained for existing services.

tasks.title: Replace QuickBooks FileMaker scripts with backend API
tasks.description: Remove FileMaker script execution for QuickBooks (initializeQuickBooks, testConnection, etc.) from src/api/fileMaker.js. Replace with backend API calls to new QuickBooks endpoints. Update financial UI panels to use new integration points. Add feature flag support.

tasks.title: Update dualWriteService for Supabase-only mode
tasks.description: Refactor src/services/dualWriteService.js to remove FileMaker writes. Either deprecate entirely (if backend handles all writes) or update to single-write mode with logging. Add deprecation warnings. Document migration path.

tasks.title: Remove FileMaker reconciliation from financialSyncService
tasks.description: Update src/services/financialSyncService.js to remove FileMaker dapiRecords reconciliation logic. Update to rely solely on Supabase customer_sales as source of truth. Add migration validation if needed.

tasks.title: Remove FileMaker environment detection from initializationService
tasks.description: Update src/services/initializationService.js to remove FileMaker environment detection (window.FileMaker check). Remove FileMaker-specific initialization paths. Simplify to Supabase-only startup flow. Keep backward compatibility via feature flag initially.

tasks.title: Remove FileMaker auth from SignIn component
tasks.description: Update src/components/auth/SignIn.jsx to remove FileMaker authentication flow. Remove FileMaker environment detection and bridge authentication. Keep only Supabase authentication. Add feature flag support for gradual rollout.

tasks.title: Simplify dataService to single routing path
tasks.description: Refactor src/services/dataService.js to remove dual-environment routing. Remove ENVIRONMENT_TYPES.FILEMAKER and AUTH_METHODS.FILEMAKER constants. Remove environment context tracking. Simplify to single Supabase + Backend API path. Keep feature flag support for transition period.

tasks.title: Remove useFileMakerBridge hook
tasks.description: Delete useFileMakerBridge hook from src/hooks/index.js. Update any components still importing it. Ensure no components depend on FileMaker bridge functionality. Add deprecation notices before removal.

tasks.title: Delete FileMaker API files
tasks.description: Delete src/api/fileMaker.js and src/api/fileMakerEdgeFunction.js. Verify no imports remain. Update src/api/index.js if it re-exports these modules. Document what was removed.

tasks.title: Remove fm-gofer dependency
tasks.description: Remove fm-gofer from package.json dependencies. Run npm install to update lock file. Verify build succeeds without it. Check for any remaining imports.

tasks.title: Remove FileMaker environment variables
tasks.description: Remove VITE_FM_URL, VITE_FM_DATABASE, VITE_FM_USER, VITE_FM_PASSWORD from .env.example. Update environment variable documentation. Add migration notes for users to update their .env files.

tasks.title: Remove FileMaker deployment scripts
tasks.description: Remove or deprecate npm run deploy-to-fm and npm run upload scripts from package.json. Update deployment documentation. Keep scripts in git history for reference.

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md to remove FileMaker references
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md to remove all FileMaker-specific guidance. Update architecture section to reflect Supabase-first approach. Remove FileMaker integration section. Update development guidelines to remove FileMaker considerations. Keep migration history for reference.

tasks.title: Update README.md to remove FileMaker references
tasks.description: Update README.md to reflect Supabase-only architecture. Remove FileMaker setup instructions. Update architecture diagrams if present. Add migration completed notice.

tasks.title: Update test mocks to remove FileMaker fixtures
tasks.description: Remove FileMaker-specific test fixtures and mocks. Update tests to use backend API mocks instead. Ensure all tests pass with new mock data shapes.

tasks.title: Run full regression test suite
tasks.description: Execute complete test suite after all migrations. Verify all features work: customers, projects, tasks, notes, links, financial records, QuickBooks, teams. Test authentication flow, data CRUD operations, and user workflows. Document any issues found.

tasks.title: Remove feature flags and finalize migration
tasks.description: After successful validation, remove feature flag system and hard-code Supabase/Backend API paths. Remove all temporary compatibility code. Final cleanup pass. Create migration completion report.
